sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, Amt1,CC,Contract) (Select KeyID + '-data2', Co, GL, Amt1,CC,Contract from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set KeyID = KeyID + '-data3', Assgnmt = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract = 'LS Inv Exp'
update TransX set Contract = '', Flex1 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, Amt1,CC,Contract,Flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1,(case when co = '2300' then '5HII000004' else '5USI000000' end) as CC,Contract,'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set Assgnmt = '' where keyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1 where keyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = ''
update TransX set GL = '6915000', Assgnmt = 'Fairfax stk grants' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '6114001'
update TransX set Assgnmt = 'IF only' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '6115007'
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]', Amt1 = -Amt1 where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1, CC, Contract, Assgnmt, Flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, CC, 'LS Inv Exp' as Contract, Assgnmt, 'pass2' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, CC, Contract, Assgnmt)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 <> 'pass2'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 then '40' else '50' end), Flex1 = '', Txt = 'LS Inv Exp Reclass' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, CC, Contract, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
